'''Thelaa''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] student who attended at the [[University of Alderaan/Legends|University of Alderaan]] and worked as a composer of notable skill during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Originally born on a backwater [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] agrarian [[Planet/Legends|world]], Thelaa possessed short blond hair and overlarge [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Her friend [[Hari Seldona]] noted that she projected "an expression of innocence and gullibility."

Thelaa soon became involved with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], becoming a gunrunner. Much of her time became occupied with rendezvous after rendezvous in [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] [[Castle Lands]]—so much of her time, in fact, that she began plagiarizing the work of the long-forgotten composer [[Salyer]] to hand in to her professors.

The young girl met her end when she was trapped by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agents on one of her [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] outings. However, both she and the operatives were destroyed by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first]] [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] before interrogation could commence.
